event: View of the Via Appia Antica near Terracina
description: A panoramic landscape painting showing the ancient Via Appia (Appian Way) stretching into the distance under a dramatic sunset sky. Stone ruins and ancient tombs line both sides of the road. Small figures on foot and on donkey travel along the road. The sky is filled with warm orange, pink, and gray clouds. Mountains are visible in the far distance. The scene is rendered with atmospheric perspective, the ruins silhouetted against the glowing sky.

_meta.title: Via Appia Antica in Der Nähe Von Terracina, Signiert, Bezeichnet H. Corrodi Roma, Öl Auf Leinwand, 86,5 X 165 Cm
